template: UPDATE employees SET salary = {employees_salary} WHERE employee_id = {employees_employee_id}
UPDATE employees SET department_id = {departments_department_id} WHERE employee_id = {employees_employee_id}
description: Transfer an employee to a different department

template: UPDATE departments SET manager_id = {employees_employee_id} WHERE department_id = {departments_department_id}
description: Assign or change a department manager

template: UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * (1 + {employees_commission_pct}) WHERE department_id = {departments_department_id}
description: Give all employees in a department a percentage-based raise

template: UPDATE employees SET job_id = '{jobs_job_id}', salary = {employees_salary}, department_id = {departments_department_id} WHERE employee_id = {employees_employee_id}
description: Update employee job and salary and department (promotion/transfer)

template: UPDATE departments SET location_id = {locations_location_id} WHERE department_id = {departments_department_id}
description: Move a department to a new location
